[2018-05-15 20:08] lostvalkyrie (Valerie): Crash_Overlord (20 :Gold: :Blue: :Blue: :Red: :Red: , 1 Supply) 6 :Health:
At Start of Turn: Gain 5 :Attack:
:Click: : Pay :Blue: :Attack: :Attack: and destroy an enemy blocker with 3 or less health
[2018-05-15 20:13] lostvalkyrie (Valerie): Plus your name is really cool
[2018-05-15 20:16] kaelii: Gordo:  ( 14 :Gold:  :Blue: :Blue: :Blue: :Green: :Green: :Green:  , Supply 1 ) :Health:  8
Start of turn: Gain :Attack: :Attack: :Attack:
:Click: 4 :Gold: :Blue: :Blue: , consume :Drone: :Drone:  (3rd drone?), construct a Wild Drone and a Shredder
[2018-05-15 20:17] xyotsuba: Why does it have 8 hp
[2018-05-15 20:17] kaelii: Mostly because he's fat.
[2018-05-15 20:17] lostvalkyrie (Valerie): What about Crash Overlord?
[2018-05-15 20:18] darkeisbein: seems pretty boring tbh, randomly hates on some units that happen to be blockers
[2018-05-15 20:18] kaelii: I'm more attached to the click making wild drones than anything else..
[2018-05-15 20:18] darkeisbein: and otherwise is just an expensive but efficient attacker that you don't go out of your way to get
[2018-05-15 20:20] xyotsuba: Gordo breachproof is actually fucking insane
[2018-05-15 20:20] crash_overlord: What. You go for it every time theres better than wall defense :monkaS:
[2018-05-15 20:21] xyotsuba: If opponent is under 7 attack u just win
[2018-05-15 20:22] darkeisbein: sure but it is expensive
[2018-05-15 20:22] darkeisbein: like hannibull is less expensive and not really a problem
[2018-05-15 20:22] kaelii: Add more initial cost to it maybe? Or make the click more gold expensive?
[2018-05-15 20:23] darkeisbein: and it's not all that bp since for the click to generate value you have to have drones lying around
[2018-05-15 20:23] darkeisbein: and drones are notoriously not super bp
[2018-05-15 20:23] xyotsuba: U use the click to transition
[2018-05-15 20:23] darkeisbein: sure but you still want some turns to transition into bp
[2018-05-15 20:24] darkeisbein: so you buy an expensive unit and then need some time to transition, so I'd say it's probably fine
[2018-05-15 20:24] xyotsuba: The click is really value
[2018-05-15 20:24] kaelii: I mean, you definitely can't quickly convert into frontline and they probably can find some turns where they just get to kill econ or attack.
[2018-05-15 20:24] darkeisbein: and Gordo itself is pretty breach vulnerable
[2018-05-15 20:25] xyotsuba: If they are killing shredders and wild drones it is plexo level defense
[2018-05-15 20:25] darkeisbein: like 3 attack for 8 health is more breach vulnerable then splitters
[2018-05-15 20:25] kaelii: If they're denying your centurion any absorb by killing off your shredders and a wild drone it's still probably decent.
[2018-05-15 20:26] kaelii: If they're doing it to deny wall absorb its probably a mistake.
[2018-05-15 20:26] darkeisbein: maybe? but you don't want the click in a centurion set unless your opponent is at like 10 guaranteed damage minimum
[2018-05-15 20:27] darkeisbein: I mean depends on wether you have a squishy backline or not
[2018-05-15 20:27] darkeisbein: if shredders and wilds are your most breach vulnerable thing outside of Gordo might aswell kill them and deny absorb
[2018-05-15 20:29] darkeisbein: the click is still potentially very strong since at a certain point, wilds are just as valuable as 2 drones
[2018-05-15 20:30] darkeisbein: so you are essentially getting a discount shredder at turn
[2018-05-15 20:30] kaelii: Or more valuable because they have an extra health.
[2018-05-15 20:30] darkeisbein: or even that, although that is probably very rare?
[2018-05-15 20:30] darkeisbein: then again it encourages you to go bp, so maybe not as rare 😄
[2018-05-15 20:31] kaelii: Yeah, similarly its still kinda interesting if all the click does is convert 1 drone into 1 wild drone for ~1BB or so.
[2018-05-15 20:31] darkeisbein: so in light of that it should probably be 3-4BB
[2018-05-15 20:32] kaelii: If they kill it you got a really cheap wall for your drone. If they ignore it you get extra gold.
[2018-05-15 20:32] darkeisbein: I just realized that with a shredder this represents ccrazy soak supply 😄
[2018-05-15 20:32] kaelii: Yeah lotta health to burn through in a dgrid game.
[2018-05-15 20:33] kaelii: I don't like it JUST making shredders because then you just have a bad steelforge click.
[2018-05-15 20:36] lostvalkyrie (Valerie): Could give it a life span
[2018-05-15 20:38] darkeisbein: I don't see what that'd do
[2018-05-15 20:39] liadahlia (Lia): where are you guys getting these GW pepe emotes anyways
[2018-05-15 20:39] kaelii: Fragile, or lower max HP would make it less powerful to be full frontline with allowing a breach for 4-7
[2018-05-15 20:39] kaelii: Granted you'll probably have some other nice things or just lose your blastforges if you allow a breach of 6

[2018-05-18 13:30] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... I don't really like both of the version of the unit

For the :Blue: / :Red: , I don't see the point of it's "last breath", that just one more :Attack: before it really die, and that's 2 :Health: :Blocker: for 3 :Gold: , which is nice, but you pay :Blue: + :Red: to get it, that seems really expensive, and it's that plus the frontline effect, which is here to avoid using this unit as a really cheap in gold attacker, I guess ? And I think you're right to don't allow the player to use this unit early, but the problem is that the unit is only usefull as some kind of a blue/red sink in the middle game something like that. I think that the unit is too complicated to play for what it does.

Which isn't the case for the :Red: one, but it's only 2 :Gold:   :Red:  that's 2 nitrocybe one ready for next turn, another for the turn after, I think that's too good. This version probably deserve to cost 4 gold,  because of it's worth 2 :Attack: or 1 :Attack: + 1 :Health:  :Blocker: : and it's versatile, even if it's not prompt (maybe it should only 3 :Gold: ? Mmmh... that's something between 3 and 4)

Overall, I think that the problem in the idea of the unit is that i don't really see the point to invent "last breath" in Prismata, while 1 :Stamina: could get a really similar effect

--- Thread (4 messages, 2018-05-21) ---
[2018-05-21 02:10] apooche: This is avoided in prismata by having a monodirectional resource exchange flow. So since we have clicks that turn red into attack, we will never have a click that turns attacks into red. And then we have things that turn attack into gold, we will never get something that turns gold into red either. But we can turn red directly into gold, since that flow is the same direction.
[2018-05-21 02:11] apooche: Units like ferritin sac don’t have to respect this since the exchange happens over multiple turns.
[2018-05-21 02:13] apooche: This is all in section 5 of the design guidelines by Pjoelj, which is linked in the pins.
[2018-05-21 02:16] apooche: (And I wouldn’t make this my challenge, my goal next time it’s my turn is to make a challenge that http404 doesn’t balk at :LongNoseLiar: )

messages.author: apooche
messages.content: This is avoided in prismata by having a monodirectional resource exchange flow. So since we have clicks that turn red into attack, we will never have a click that turns attacks into red. And then we have things that turn attack into gold, we will never get something that turns gold into red either. But we can turn red directly into gold, since that flow is the same direction.

messages.author: apooche
messages.content: Units like ferritin sac don’t have to respect this since the exchange happens over multiple turns.

messages.author: apooche
messages.content: This is all in section 5 of the design guidelines by Pjoelj, which is linked in the pins.

[2018-05-21 07:01] crash_overlord: Doesn't break sdr at all? 🤔

[2018-05-21 07:06] crash_overlord: it's -5 hp for opp +5 damage next turn
[2018-05-21 07:07] crash_overlord: I like the design idea though. it's like an even more extreme version of bloodpact
[2018-05-21 07:07] kaelii: I mean, if you have a nivo or something sitting around that is use it or lose it and  your options are freeze for 5 or freeze a wall.
[2018-05-21 07:08] xyotsuba: U don’t freeze this it is actively giving u dmg
[2018-05-21 07:08] xyotsuba: U freeze the wall to make sure they have to soak on this
[2018-05-21 07:09] xyotsuba: I mean I guess u break even so if its a nivo charge u might as well?
[2018-05-21 07:10] xyotsuba: If freezing their absorber denies absorb u do that. If u cant deny absorb andfreezing this gives u reach to kill value (blocking attacker or drones) then u freeze this i guess
[2018-05-21 07:11] xyotsuba: Oh u also freeze this if the Gauss charges will be wasted (for example u are full synced ISO’s or they have cheiftan+doomed wall on 1 lifespan next turn and u can exploit)
[2018-05-21 07:12] xyotsuba: Anyway I think it is a well designed unit
[2018-05-21 07:15] shadourow (Rando): The idea is great, but it's seems really strange to balance
[2018-05-21 07:19] kaelii: The question is primarily: What price to you pay to take deal with damage at a later inflation instead of the current inflation?
[2018-05-21 07:19] kaelii: Is 5 damage worth paying 2G to soak next turn instead of this turn?
[2018-05-21 07:20] kaelii: The answer and similar questions depend largely on the efficiency of soak available and your economy size.
[2018-05-21 07:21] kaelii: In theory you could convert a conduit and 2 drones into an arbitrary delay on some amount of damage your opponent is dealing this turn.
[2018-05-21 07:22] xyotsuba: If it turns out this unit is too weak just give the charges buildtime 2
[2018-05-21 07:23] .jrkirby (jrkirby): My idea for balance is like this: If you bought 1 of these every turn forever, ho much would it cost right now? Answer 2G + 2 drones(6EE) + conduit (4) = 12G... that's perhaps a reasonable 5 HP thing. But it's got other disadvantages and advantages.
[2018-05-21 07:24] .jrkirby (jrkirby): But overall, not really that worried, because defense can vary a lot with efficiency, for instance plexo cell is ridiculous. Defensive overpoweredness rarely breaks the game in an unfair or unfun way.

[2018-05-21 07:26] xyotsuba: Defensive efficiency doesn’t snowball so it can’t break the game

[2018-05-21 07:27] xyotsuba: I mean I guess if there was a 20 hp absorber the game would kinda be boring but that’s only cuz it would take forever to get enough attack for the game to go anywhere
